revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Myōken_Faith]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Myōken_Faith]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Navbox | name = Munakata Faith | title = [[Munakata Taisha|Munakata Faith]] | listclass = hlist | image = [[File:Itsukushima Shrine Torii Gate (13890465459).jpg|150px|link=|alt=]] |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Ichikishimahime|ja|イチキシマヒメ}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|タギツヒメ}} * {{ill|Takiribime|ja|タキリビメ}} |group2 = Head Shrines |list2 = * [[Munakata Taisha]] * [[Itsukushima Shrine]] |group3 = Other Shrines |list3 = * Its..."
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/Myoken Faith]] to [[User:Immanuelle/Myōken Faith]]
added [[Category:Buddhist gods and goddesses]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
added [[Category:Bodhisattvas]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
31 revisions imported
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Immanuelle/Myōken Faith]] to [[Template:Myōken Faith]]

Text replacement - "Hikata Shrine" to "Hitaka Shrine"

Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 10 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

Bot: consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
